productDisplayName: Puma Men Exsis Black Sports Shoes
description: Get used to superior comfort and performance during training with these Exsis 2 shoes from puma. These shoes work as hard as you do to help you train better and look great doing it. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper AirMesh upper for superior breathability Synthetic overlays for better structure Lace-ups for snug Fit puma formstripe and Puma jumping cat logo on the sides for comfort and style Cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfort Midsole Midsole with ArchTec technology to stabilise the midfoot Outsole ArchTec on outsole to guide the foot through a natural transition from touch-down to toe-off Long-lasting CELL unit in the heel for improved shock absorption Outsolemade of high abrasion resistant material that provides durability in high-wear areas Multi-directional pattern outsole with flex grooves for more flexibility to the feet shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
